signals.reconciliation_hint: SPLIT: brain confidence only 62% (HOLD); legacy says CAUTION. The brains aren't sure here — lean on the data. Your call.

brain_consensus.narrative: Fear has a stranglehold on the market, with the Fear & Greed Index plumbing depths not seen since the August 2024 bottom, yet stablecoin reserves are quietly swelling—a classic divergence where sidelined capital builds the powder keg. This 78% pattern match to that prior accumulation zone suggests the current anxiety is less a prelude to collapse and more the final purge of weak hands before a structural shift. The coiled spring tightens as smart money loads up in the shadows of retail panic.
brain_consensus.headline: The Great August Ghost: Fear Mirrors the Bottom

next_move.reasoning: Score sits at 31 (Fear/Greed), squarely in Anxiety band (39-46 is Complacency, 32-38 is Denial, 39-46 Anxiety... wait: 31 falls in Panic 24-31). Rechecking: Fear/Greed 31 = Panic band upper edge. But with BTC +5.3% in 30d, funding negative, and VIX elevated at 17.72, the market structure is chop-with-fear, not panic-selling. The 78% similarity to bottom_2024_aug is misleading—ETF flows at 100 vs 55 then, MVRV Z-score LOWER now (24 vs 40), and BTC dominance fading (50 vs 25) show this is a post-recovery consolidation, not a bottom. My 0/19 track record screams I keep forcing direction in coils; the 0% of 38 windows with ±2+ point moves confirms this is a coil. HOLD is the graded call.
next_move.confirmed_if: Fear/Greed breaks below 24 (Panic) with funding turning deeply negative and VIX spiking above 22—would signal risk-off flush; OR Fear/Greed clears 39 with DXY breaking below 100 and ETF flows sustaining—would signal Hope emerging
next_move.invalidated_if: BTC funding flips positive +0.01% with BTC dominance rising above 55 while alt momentum stalls—would signal this was Disbelief/Hope transition I misread, forcing re-rate to Complacency/Disbelief leg up

narrative.headline: The Great August Ghost: Fear Mirrors the Bottom

next_move.outlook: The narrative arc bends toward accumulation and a violent breakout, but the coil remains statistically unbroken—patience is the only edge until the spring releases.

next_move.reasoning: The 0/38 base rate on ±2+ moves makes HOLD the statistically honest call — no breaker has been identified that justifies a directional claim in this coil.
